title: remAIke.TV - 8K Restoration Showcase | 8K | remAIke.TV
description:
All 5 restorations shown with rapid before/after toggle

Watch vintage films restored from as low as 176x144 to stunning 8K (7680x4320)!

Featured restorations:
- Superman (1941): 480x352 > 7680x4320
- Betty Boop (1931): 176x144 > 7680x4320
- Frankenstein (1910): 320x240 > 7680x4320
- Duck and Cover (1951): 320x240 > 7680x4320
- Skeleton Dance (1929): 480x360 > 7680x4320
